source.notes: Minimal generated-binary smoke proof only. It uses a headless terminal facade and fixture frame; it does not claim ratatui/crossterm ownership, live app-server transport, or a full interactive TUI.

cases.name: cancel-key-renders-fixture-frame
cases.title: Codex TUI Smoke
cases.input: Summarize next raw Codex TUI step
cases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke
status: idle | model: gpt-5.2-codex
system> read-only upstream fixture
assistant> Rendered through Haxe to Rust
input> Summarize next raw Codex TUI step
key: ctrl-c
exit: cancelled
terminal: restored

cases.name: quit-key-renders-fixture-frame
cases.title: Codex TUI Smoke
cases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke
status: waiting-for-input | model: gpt-5.2-codex
user> fixture prompt
assistant> fixture response
input> 
key: q
exit: quit
terminal: restored

loopCases.name: status-input-draw-cancel-loop
loopCases.expectedTrace:
tui.draw
app.status=ready
app.input=continue raw TUI
tui.draw
tui.key=ctrl-c
loopCases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke Loop
status: ready | model: gpt-5.2-codex
system> headless app loop
assistant> waiting for raw Codex events
input> continue raw TUI
trace:
tui.draw
app.status=ready
app.input=continue raw TUI
tui.draw
tui.key=ctrl-c
exit: cancelled
renders: 2
terminal: restored

loopCases.name: resize-render-shutdown-first-loop
loopCases.expectedSnapshot:
Codex TUI Smoke Loop
status: idle | model: gpt-5.2-codex
user> fixture prompt
assistant> fixture response
input> 
trace:
tui.resize
app.exit=shutdown_first
exit: cancelled
renders: 1
terminal: restored
